title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 511.590 - Satisfaction, where entered
text:
511.590.  Satisfaction, where entered. — If the acknowledgment is made in court, it shall be entered of record; but if made before the clerk in vacation, it shall be entered on the minutes, signed by the party making it, and attested by the clerk.
(RSMo 1939 § 1288) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1123; 1919 § 1574; 1909 § 2143
